metadata.description: Claude Code plugins by Nozomi Koborinai

plugins.name: agent-team-fullstack
plugins.description: Orchestrate full-stack development with Agent Teams for parallel implementation. Use when the user says "build with a team", "develop in parallel", "spin up an Agent Team", or "investigate this bug".

plugins.name: mermaid-diagram
plugins.description: Create Mermaid diagrams, generate PNGs via mmdc, and reference them from Markdown documents. Use when creating, updating, or managing diagrams in a project.
